heading.title: A barebones starter
heading.description: Use this space to introduce your project, team, or product.

introParagraphs: This starter keeps the content pipeline, routing, and theming in place so you can focus on writing and shipping.
Swap in your own tone, remove sections you do not need, and connect your preferred data sources when you are ready.

studioSnapshot.title: What is included
items: Next.js app router wired to Contentlayer and MDX.
Prebuilt components you can reuse or replace.
TypeScript, ESLint, and basic styling tokens ready to extend.
Placeholder data only—bring your own stories and assets.
